get.summary:
Get a list of pkeys
change this to get domain level pkeys

delete.summary:
Deprovision a DirectConnect subnet by removing the Dx_<vlanId> VLAN from CVaaS.
Can only be called when the subnet is in Allocated state.

parameters.name: subnetId
parameters.description: UUID of the DirectConnect subnet to deprovision

post.summary:
Trigger fabric provisioning for the project's DirectConnect subnet.
Transitions the subnet from Allocated → Initializing so the reconciler
pushes the Dx_<vlanId> VLAN to CVaaS. Returns the subnetId for polling.

parameters.name: subnetId
parameters.description: UUID of the DirectConnect subnet to provision; if omitted, the first available subnet is selected

get.summary:
Poll the provisioning state of a DirectConnect subnet.
Returns state == "Allocated" on success or "Failed" with an error message.

parameters.name: subnetId
parameters.description: UUID of the DirectConnect subnet returned by CreateDirectConnect

allocate last IP as gateway
default will set as lastIp gateway ip address

networkNetworkDeployment.description:
- Unknown: Default type
 - Static: static networks are pre-existing networks and just need to be onboarded
 - Dynamic: dynamic networks will need to be created and configured

isEditable.title: isEditable represents if the network is allowed to edit

Default network or it can be called as the super network
Only one network can be marked as the default.

 - IPv6: IPv6 family

networkNetworkState.title:
- Initializing: network initializing
 - Creating: network is being created
 - Failed: network failed
 - Active: network is created and Active
by default it will be active
 - Updating: network is being updated
 - Deleting: network is being deleted
 - Allocating: network is being assigned
 - Allocated: network is successfully assigned
 - Deallocated: network is deallocated

networkTagDefinitionEntry.description: TagDefinitionEntry represents a single tag definition entry.

networkUpdateTagDefinitionReq.description:
UpdateTagDefinitionReq replaces all tag definitions for the identified resource pool.
At least one of resourcePoolId, provider, or customer must be set.

VpcPeeringCreateResp represents the response after creating a VPC peering
Empty response

VpcPeeringDeleteResp represents the response after deleting a VPC peering
empty response

tags.title: tags associated with the static route

createdAt.title: Time when the VPC peering was created

networkVpcPeeringGetResp.title: VpcPeeringGetResp represents the response after getting a VPC peering

networkVpcPeeringState.title:
- Initializing: static route initializing
 - Creating: static route is being created
 - Failed: static route failed
 - Active: static route is active
 - Updating: static route is being updated
 - Deleting: static route is being deleted

networkVpcRouteMapState.title:
- Initializing: vpc route blocking rule is initializing
 - Creating: vpc route blocking rule is being created
 - Failed: vpc route blocking rule creation failed
 - Active: vpc route blocking rule is created and active (default state)
 - Updating: vpc route blocking rule is being updated
 - Deleting: vpc route blocking rule is sucesfully updated
 - Allocating: vpc route blocking rule is being assigned
 - Allocated: vpc route blocking rule has been successfully assigned
 - Idle: vpc route blocking rule ideal state

externalDocs.description: API spec for network manager, providing APIs to work with network constructs available in cloud
